other_observers: Seen with Van Truan.  Bird found earlier in the day by Steve Mlodinow, also seen by Mark Peterson, Stan Oswald, and Chris Wilkens on 6/26/2023.
duration: Watched the bird for nearly an hour
description: Van Truan got some photos.  https://macaulaylibrary.org/asset/588689981 Hopefully the finder will provide details, since he saw the bird much closer.   The bird clearly looked right for a Long-tailed Jaeger, without the tail streamers.
